Watchboard Daily Brief — 2026-04-21

Balikatan 2026 Day 1: Gen. Brawner Opens Historic Exercise; Japan Deploys Type 88 Missiles — China Warns 'Playing with Fire'
SAC Jets Bomb KNU Hospital Near Thai Border — One Bomb Crosses Into Thailand; KIA Kills ~40 Militia in Hpakant; IPU Confirms CRPH Legitimacy
First Direct US-Hamas Talks Yield No Breakthrough; Daily Strikes Kill 5+ on Apr 20; Toll Reaches 775 Since October Ceasefire
